title: Brazilian Prosciutto Gratin
description: A rich and savory Brazilian-inspired dish featuring crispy prosciutto and creamy gratin.
instructions: Peel and slice the roasted sweet potatoes into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
Butter a 9x13-inch baking dish and arrange the sweet potato slices in the bottom.
Top the sweet potatoes with prosciutto slices.
In a separate bowl, mix the gratin cheese and heavy cream until well combined.
Pour the cheese mixture over the prosciutto and sweet potatoes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is bubbly.
